case_title: BENJAMIN GHAYOUR FARAJI VS. PIZZERIA UNO LOMBARD, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATI

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF FARAJI, BENJAMIN GHAYOUR AS TO DEFENDANT PIZZERIA UNO LOMBARD, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATI ON DBA PIZZERIA SFO JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FARAJI, BENJAMIN GHAYOUR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PIZZERIA UNO LOMBARD, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATI ON DBA PIZZERIA SFO $4,395.77 PRINCIPAL, $.28 INTEREST, $156.30 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,552.35, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
